name: Anaplan
hq: Miami, FL (relocated from San Francisco in early 2024)
description: Anaplan is a cloud-native connected planning platform for enterprise finance, sales & marketing, supply chain, and HR. Taken private by Thoma Bravo in June 2022. Total ARR surpassed $1B as of early 2025. Preparing confidential IPO filing as of January 2026.
businessModel: SaaS subscription platform. Annual recurring subscriptions. 200+ customers with ACV >$1M representing more than half of aggregate ARR. Platform enables cross-functional connected planning from a single cloud-based modeling engine (Hyperblock technology).
revenueModel: Annual subscription (ARR-based). Three BUs: Finance >$600M ARR, Sales & Marketing >$200M ARR, Supply Chain ~$200M ARR (fastest growing). Total ARR >$1B as of early 2025.

productLines.name: FP&A
productLines.description: Budgeting, forecasting, financial consolidation. 9x Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader.

productLines.name: Sales Performance Management
productLines.description: Territory & quota, incentive compensation. 2025 IDC MarketScape Leader.

productLines.name: Supply Chain Planning
productLines.description: Demand planning, S&OP, inventory optimization. Fastest-growing BU. 2024 IDC MarketScape Leader.

productLines.name: Anaplan Data Orchestrator
productLines.description: Enterprise data integration and management, launched late 2024.

growthDrivers.driver: Supply chain planning expansion — fastest-growing BU approaching $200M ARR
$500M multi-year product innovation roadmap including AI agents and Data Orchestrator
40% increase in software engineering headcount under Thoma Bravo
Potential IPO re-listing in 2026 — confidential S-1 filing in preparation

moat: Proprietary Hyperblock multidimensional calculation engine deeply embedded in enterprise planning workflows. High switching costs from complexity of customer-built models. Multi-year Gartner/IDC recognition reinforces procurement credibility.
